## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (`ruff check` + `ruff format --check`)
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Uses the canonical vocabulary from `CONTEXT.md` (no new synonyms)
- [ ] Updated docs / ADRs if the change is architectural
